rulings.Case Title: LOI TRUONG ET AL VS. XIAO ZHEN WU ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Plaintiffs' Amended Notice Of Second Motion For Violation Of Court Order, For Finding Of Contempt Against Debtor And Defendant Xiao Zhen Wu, And For Monetary Sanctions Agianst Defendant Xiao Zhen Wu And A Finding Of Contempt As To Defendant Xiao Zhen Wu
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2023 line 1. PLAINTIFF LOI TRUONG, MY NGUYEN, KEITH ARMSTRONG, SUMMER SIMPSON, KAROL NAVARRETE, LUIS HERNANDEZ Plaintiffs' Amended Notice Of Second Motion For Violation Of Court Order, For Finding Of Contempt Against Debtor And Defendant Xiao Zhen Wu, And For Monetary Sanctions Agianst Defendant Xiao Zhen Wu And A Finding Of Contempt As To Defendant Xiao Zhen Wu Hearing Required. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: VY NGUYEN ET AL VS. JANET KRAHLING ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2023 line 2. CROSS COMPLAINANT JANET KRAHLING DEMURRER to CROSS COMPLAINT is OVERRULED, 10 days to answer. Complaint sufficiently states facts to support causes of action for indemnity. The veracity of the allegations is not an appropriate subject of the demurrer. Cross-Complaint alleges that the demurring party is a party to the settlement agreement; it also alleges that there are claims asserted against the cross-complainant by parties other that the moving cross-defendant. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849). Parties who intend to appear at the hearing must give notice to opposing parties and the court promptly, but no later than 4:00 p.m. the court day before the hearing unless the tentative ruling has specified that a hearing is required. Notice of contesting a tentative ruling shall be provided by sending an email to the court to Department501ContestTR@sftc.org with a copy to all other parties stating, without argument, the portion(s) of the tentative ruling that the party contests. A party may not argue at the hearing if the opposing party is not so notified, and the opposing party does not appear.

rulings.Case Title: SHAWNY K. WILLIAMS VS. SHANDA LOVE ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Summary Judgment And For Defendant(S) Motion For Order To Transfer Unlawful Detainer To Probate Court

DEFENDANT SHANDA LOVE, SHANNON WILLIAMS, MASHAMA NOLAN Notice Of Motion For Reconsideration Of Summary Judgment And For Defendant(S) Motion For Order To Transfer Unlawful Detainer To Probate Court is DENIED. rulings.Case Title: GAETANI REAL ESTATE VS. DOUG SEWARD ET AL
rulings.Calendar Matter: MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for July 25, 2023 line 6. DEFENDANT DOUG SEWARD MOTION TO QUASH SERVICE OF SUMMONS OR STAY OR DISMISS is DENIED. Defendant served by a registered process server. Moving party failed to overcome the Evidence Code 647 presumption. Defendant's counsel, Kai Shintani and AIDS Legal Referral Panel, is ordered to comply with CCP 1167.4 in future. =(501/CFH) Parties may appear in-person, telephonically or via Zoom (Video - Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849; or Phone Dial in: (551) 285-1373; Webinar ID: 160 560 5023; Password: 172849).
